meaning: n.橄榄香皂(用橄榄油和碱制成的)
examples: FOR a taste of the real Spain, try Castile-La Mancha.
Either all is lost, or else Castile will be head of the world.
A technical glitch caused the temporary removal of the Castile video for about an hour, according to Facebook.
Joanna the Mad of Castile was a key figure in the struggle for control of 16th Century Spain.
Dr. Bronner's best-selling product, a bottle of all-purpose liquid hemp peppermint Castile soap, is not your run-of-the mill cleanser.
